scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,user,prod,order,notif -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:notification"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n user,prod,order,notif -c green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:notification"
scripts.test: concurrently -n fe,user,prod,order,notif "npm run test:frontend" "npm run test:user" "npm run test:product" "npm run test:order" "npm run test:notification"
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres mongodb redis rabbitmq
